trip.label: Trip
trip.description: Driving activity or mileage baseline event used to update vehicle usage context.
trip.timeline_use: Shows vehicle usage and odometer progression.
trip.ai_context_use: Helps estimate usage intensity and mileage-based wear.

refuel.label: Refuel
refuel.description: Fueling or charging event with optional consumption and cost data.
refuel.timeline_use: Shows fuel or energy usage history.

repair.label: Repair
repair.description: Completed corrective work after component failure, complaint, or malfunction.
repair.timeline_use: Shows resolved issues and repair costs.
repair.ai_context_use: Provides evidence of recurring failures and component reliability.

inspection.label: Inspection
inspection.description: Manual or automated vehicle check that records observed condition without necessarily replacing parts.
inspection.timeline_use: Shows condition checks and inspection results.
inspection.ai_context_use: Adds factual observations before maintenance or diagnostics decisions.

accident.label: Accident
accident.description: Collision, crash, impact, or safety incident that may affect future vehicle condition.
accident.timeline_use: Highlights major damage and safety history.
accident.ai_context_use: Explains later repairs, warnings, or degraded component health.

recall.label: Recall
recall.description: Manufacturer or regulator recall notice, campaign, remedy, or recall completion event.
recall.timeline_use: Shows open and completed recall actions.
recall.ai_context_use: Adds safety and manufacturer campaign context to assistant answers.

warning.label: Warning
warning.description: Dashboard light, sensor alert, owner warning, or system notification that indicates possible risk.
warning.timeline_use: Shows unresolved alerts and user-visible symptoms.
warning.ai_context_use: Helps prioritize urgent recommendations and diagnostics.

maintenance.label: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Planned preventive service such as oil change, brake service, tire rotation, or scheduled replacement.
maintenance.timeline_use: Shows routine service history and preventive work.
maintenance.ai_context_use: Improves component health and maintenance interval reasoning.

prediction.label: Prediction
prediction.description: ML-generated forecast about component risk, remaining distance, or recommended next action.
prediction.ai_context_use: Lets the assistant explain why a recommendation was made.

diagnostic.label: Diagnostic
diagnostic.description: Diagnostic scan, trouble code reading, test result, or technician finding.
diagnostic.timeline_use: Shows technical fault evidence and measurements.
diagnostic.ai_context_use: Grounds assistant responses in fault codes and test results.

part_replacement.label: Part replacement
part_replacement.description: Specific component replacement event, usually created from service or repair workflows.
part_replacement.timeline_use: Shows exact part lifecycle changes and replacement mileage.
part_replacement.ai_context_use: Helps calculate component age, service intervals, and recurring replacement patterns.

note.label: Note
note.description: Free-form owner, technician, or system note that adds context but does not fit a structured event type.
note.timeline_use: Preserves contextual observations in the vehicle timeline.
note.ai_context_use: Provides extra narrative context while keeping the event type low impact.
